alert: API availability has dropped after several web workers exited.

evidence_descriptions.check_status:web_server: Web server status is degraded after worker exits.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show worker processes exited unexpectedly.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:web_server: Web metrics show high error rate and reduced healthy workers.

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(web server worker process crashed, restart web server)
distractors: Database and cache are healthy; the failing component is the web worker pool.
